changes: Rename the public plugin title to Joystick Scroll while keeping the release package identity on the FrameAngel.JoystickScroller line.
Add a package-first build lane so development can test the plugin from FrameAngel.JoystickScrollerDev.var instead of raw DLL deploys.
Keep obfuscation in the bounded post-build lane so packaged and released plugin builds stay hardened.
